title: Thirukumaresar temple
tagline: Thirukumaresar temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Thirukumaresar Temple (also called Thiruneelakandeswarar temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in a ' RAJENDIRAPATTINAM ' also refer as 'YAZHPANAMPATTINAM
overview.description: Thirukumaresar Temple (also called Thiruneelakandeswarar temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in a ' RAJENDIRAPATTINAM ' also refer as 'YAZHPANAMPATTINAM' or ' ERUKATHAMPULIYUR ' is a village in Cuddalore district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Shiva is worshipped as Thirukumaresar, and is represented by the lingam. His consort Parvati is depicted as Verumulai Amman. The presiding deity is revered in the 7th century Tamil Saiva canonical work, the Tevaram, written by Tamil saint poets known as the Nayanars and classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam.

topPlaces.name: Rajendirapattinam
topPlaces.description: Rajendirapattinam is a village in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Authukurichi
topPlaces.description: Authukurichi is a village in the Udayarpalayam taluk of Ariyalur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Veerateeswarar Temple, Thiruvathigai
topPlaces.description: Thiruvathigai Veerateswarar Temple (also Virattaneshwara Temple, Tamil: வீரட்டானேசுவரர் ) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva. It is situated in Thiruvathigai village which is about 2 kilometres east from the town of Panruti in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Sriraman, Ariyalur
topPlaces.description: Sriraman is a village in the Andimadam taluk of Ariyalur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Srimushnam
topPlaces.description: Srimushnam is a town panchayat, and the headquarters of Srimushnam taluk, in Cuddalore district, Tamil Nadu, India. The town is sacred to Hindus and Buddhists.

topPlaces.name: Bhu Varaha Swamy temple
topPlaces.description: The Bhu Varaha Swamy temple is a Hindu temple, located at Srimushnam, in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Constructed in the South Indian style of architecture, the temple is dedicated to Varaha (Bhu Varaha Swamy), the boar-avatar of the god Vishnu and his consort Lakshmi as Ambujavalli Thayar.

topPlaces.name: Vriddhachalam block
topPlaces.description: Vriddhachalam block is a revenue block of Cuddalore district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. This revenue block consist of 51 panchayat villages.

topPlaces.name: Vriddachalam division
topPlaces.description: Vriddachalam division is a revenue division in the Cuddalore district of Tamil Nadu, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thirukumaresar temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thirukumaresar temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Thirukumaresar temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (101 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (100 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thirukumaresar temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thirukumaresar temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thirukumaresar temple?
faq.a: Stays in Thirukumaresar temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thirukumaresar temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Rajendirapattinam, Authukurichi, Veerateeswarar Temple, Thiruvathigai, Sriraman, Ariyalur, Srimushnam.
